topic: guide/base request trigger contract (minimum observable set)

contracts.description: guide/base valid next-step action must produce at least one side effect
contracts.assertion: hash changed OR /icpsp-api/ request count increased

contracts.description: calling flowSave/fzjgFlowSave alone is not sufficient to trigger backend transition
contracts.assertion: method call exists but request count remains unchanged

contracts.description: backend operation endpoints need non-null business context fields
contracts.evidence: member-post records show null linkData leading to A0002

inference.frontend_blocking: guide/base gate prevents contract entry, so backend requests are never emitted
inference.backend_requirement: when request is emitted without complete context, server returns A0002
